items.title: [正面] вельмі добрая гульня, спадабалася дынаміка і сюжэт...
items.summary:
вельмі добрая гульня, спадабалася дынаміка і сюжэт, люблю лаўкраўта, таму было цікава. усё яшчэ гуляю і планую працягваць, вельмі чакаю новых дапаўненняў. таксама спадаюцца дызайны персанажаў! 
яшчэ хацелася б адзначыць, што гэта нават самая шчодрая гача, у якую я гуляла, вельмі прыемна. 

парэкамендавала ўжо ўсім сябрам :)

items.title:
[负面] Negative:________
- The English translation is ba...
items.summary:
Negative:________
- The English translation is bad. This might either reflect on the quality of the writing or the translation itself. It feels overwrought and the constant ballooning of sentences feels like it goes nowhere fast. I'm not an english native and it feels grating to read, not to mention how much the text is crushed by the ui.
- The plot is mediocre and everything has a special word which doesn't help.
- All mechanics are a bit obfuscated, the menus are clearly made for mobile and play drags on because the only way to skip some of the rather badly written exposition is to use 4x speed because skipping is NEIN.
- It seems like some of the characters are simply better than others in ways that make building a sub-optimal party which you early on might have to, a chore instead of fun.
- The tiny roguelite parts contain no decision. You can basically always look at everything without failling and are never punished for taking a decision at the start. So its SlayTheSpire-likeness is for show. The roguelite-parts are....uninteresting.
- Very little in the way of voice acting after the prologue.
- The UI as said above is made for mobile. This means you sometimes have to scroll down in a textbox to get the rest of the text when it doesn't scroll down from autoplay, or you are looking at text in menus. Sentences and descriptions are not well parsed together. Reading character background on what accounts to 80 pixels width is not fun either.

Positive:_________
- The Gacha is very forgiving, you easily get to draw characters. Ressources feel like they're never really a problem.
- Once you understand the system, you can basically play on cruise-mode.
- The graphics look good.
- Your character name is sometimes used in dialogue, that's nice.
